The Mercury Grand Marquis is an automobile that was sold by the Mercury division of Ford Motor Company from 1975 to 2011. From 1975 to
1982, it was the premium model of the Mercury Marquis line of full-size sedans, becoming a standalone model line in 1983.For 2003 and
2004, it was sold alongside the revival of the Mercury Marauder.. From 1979 to its 2011 discontinuation, the Grand Marquis ...
